sentences.target: Ich habe eine Schwierigkeit mit dem Formular.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃviːʁɪçkaɪ̯t mɪt deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːɐ̯/

translations.de: Ich habe eine Schwierigkeit mit dem Formular.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃviːʁɪçkaɪ̯t mɪt deːm fɔʁmuˈlaːɐ̯/
translations.en: I have a difficulty with the form.
translations.es: Tengo un problema con el formulario.
translations.fr: J’ai un problème avec le formulaire.
translations.it: Ho un problema con il modulo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我填这个表格有点困难。
translations.pt: Tenho um problema com o formulário.
translations.vi: Tôi gặp rắc rối với mẫu đơn.
translations.nl: Ik heb een probleem met het formulier.
translations.hi: मुझे फॉर्म भरने में दिक्कत हो रही है।
translations.el: Έχω ένα πρόβλημα με τη φόρμα.
translations.nb: Jeg har et problem med skjemaet.
translations.da: Jeg har et problem med formularen.
translations.ja: この書類で少し困っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; expresses possession.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Schwierigkeit’.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of ‘habe’.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a prepositional phrase of relation.
Definite article, dative singular neuter; determiner of ‘Formular’ (required by ‘mit’).
Neuter noun, dative singular; object of the preposition ‘mit’.

sentences.target: Das ist keine Schwierigkeit für die Kinder.
sentences.reading: /das ɪst ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈʃviːʁɪçkaɪ̯t fyːɐ̯ diː ˈkɪndɐ/

translations.de: Das ist keine Schwierigkeit für die Kinder.
translations.ipa: /das ɪst ˈkaɪ̯nə ˈʃviːʁɪçkaɪ̯t fyːɐ̯ diː ˈkɪndɐ/
translations.en: That is not a difficulty for the kids.
translations.es: Eso no es difícil para los niños.
translations.fr: Ce n’est pas difficile pour les enfants.
translations.it: Non è difficile per i bambini.
translations.pt: Isso não é difícil para as crianças.
translations.vi: Điều đó không khó với bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Dat is niet moeilijk voor de kinderen.
translations.hi: यह बच्चों के लिए मुश्किल नहीं है।
translations.pl: To nie jest trudne dla dzieci.
translations.el: Αυτό δεν είναι δύσκολο για τα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Det er ikke vanskelig for barna.
translations.sv: Det är inte svårt för barnen.
translations.da: Det er ikke svært for børnene.
translations.ja: それは子どもたちには難しくありません。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun, nominative singular; subject.
Copula auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate nominal.
Negative determiner, feminine nominative singular; modifies predicate noun ‘Schwierigkeit’.
Feminine noun, nominative singular; predicate nominative with ‘sein’.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces beneficiary phrase.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of ‘Kinder’ (required by ‘für’).
Plural noun, accusative; object of the preposition ‘für’.

sentences.target: Er beschreibt die Schwierigkeit kurz und ruhig.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ bəˈʃʁaɪ̯pt diː ˈʃviːʁɪçkaɪ̯t kʊʁts ʊnt ˈʁuːɪç/

translations.de: Er beschreibt die Schwierigkeit kurz und ruhig.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ bəˈʃʁaɪ̯pt diː ˈʃviːʁɪçkaɪ̯t kʊʁts ʊnt ˈʁuːɪç/
translations.en: He describes the difficulty briefly and calmly.
translations.es: Él explica el problema de forma breve y tranquila.
translations.fr: Il explique le problème brièvement et calmement.
translations.it: Spiega il problema brevemente e con calma.
translations.ko: 그는 어려운 점을 간단하고 차분하게 설명해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他简短而冷静地说明问题。
translations.yue: 佢冷靜而簡短咁講出問題所在。
translations.ru: Он кратко и спокойно объясняет проблему.
translations.pt: Ele explica o problema brevemente e com calma.
translations.he: הוא מסביר את הבעיה בקצרה וברוגע.
translations.tr: Sorunu kısa ve sakin bir şekilde anlatıyor.
translations.vi: Anh ấy trình bày vấn đề một cách ngắn gọn và bình tĩnh.
translations.nl: Hij legt het probleem kort en rustig uit.
translations.uk: Він коротко й спокійно пояснює проблему.
translations.hu: Röviden és nyugodtan elmagyarázza a problémát.
translations.hi: वह समस्या को संक्षेप में और शांतिपूर्वक समझाता है।
translations.pl: On krótko i spokojnie wyjaśnia problem.
translations.el: Εξηγεί το πρόβλημα σύντομα και ήρεμα.
translations.nb: Han forklarer problemet kort og rolig.
translations.id: Dia menjelaskan masalahnya secara singkat dan tenang.
translations.sv: Han förklarar problemet kort och lugnt.
translations.ro: El explică problema pe scurt și calm.
translations.da: Han forklarer problemet kort og roligt.
translations.fi: Hän kuvaa ongelman lyhyesti ja rauhallisesti.
translations.ja: 彼は問題を手短に落ち着いて説明します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative singular masculine; subject.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Schwierigkeit’ as direct object.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of ‘beschreibt’.
Manner adverb modifying ‘beschreibt’; adverbial use of an adjective (uninflected).
Coordinating conjunction linking two adverbs (‘kurz’ and ‘ruhig’).
Manner adverb modifying ‘beschreibt’; coordinated with ‘kurz’.

sentences.target: Wir hatten eine Schwierigkeit beim Parken.

translations.de: Wir hatten eine Schwierigkeit beim Parken.
translations.en: We had a difficulty while parking.
translations.fr: On a eu du mal à se garer.
translations.it: Abbiamo avuto qualche problema a parcheggiare.
translations.ko: 우리는 주차하는 데 좀 애를 먹었어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们停车时遇到了一点麻烦。
translations.yue: 我哋泊車嗰陣有啲麻煩。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi gặp chút khó khăn khi đỗ xe.
translations.hi: हमें पार्किंग करते समय थोड़ी परेशानी हुई।
translations.da: Vi havde problemer med at parkere.
translations.ja: 駐車に少し手こずりました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, nominative plural; subject.
Main verb, simple past (Präteritum) 1st person plural; expresses past possession.
Indefinite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Schwierigkeit’.
Feminine noun, accusative singular; direct object of ‘hatten’.
Preposition in contracted form (‘bei dem’), governs dative; introduces a temporal/locative phrase (‘during/at’).
Nominalized infinitive (neuter), dative singular; object of the preposition ‘bei(m)’.
